generatedOutputs.purpose: platform-discoverable documentation entry and task router
complete generated catalog of authorities, task routes, lifecycles, and sources
generated source hashes and freshness identity

authorities.scope: AI collaboration rules, protected domains, completion evidence, Git authorization, and delivery gates
Markdown classification, root placement, task routing, generated outputs, and temporary evidence lifecycle
runtime entrypoints, repository map, component ownership, and cross-module boundaries
truth vocabulary, source authority, readiness, no-advice, and protected financial-domain distinctions
normalized historical OHLCV contract, quality outcomes, persistence, and read interfaces
consumer product experience, information architecture, visual system, accessibility, and frontend implementation
dependency authority, supported targets, bootstrap, snapshots, local runtime, and optional configuration
validation command routing and evidence execution reference; AGENTS.md owns policy
database diagnostics, baseline artifacts, Phase F configuration, and DuckDB local analytics
explicit local historical OHLCV starter cache seeding and verification
sanitized offline operator-evidence preparation and manual review
production-readiness documentation, release qualification, and operational review boundaries
temporary audit evidence classification and retirement policy

taskRoutes.task: Backend, API, service, repository, or schema work
taskRoutes.note: Add the closest source and tests; shared schemas and public contracts require producer/consumer review.

taskRoutes.task: Provider, market, scanner, freshness, or source-authority work
taskRoutes.note: Provider order, fallback, cache, freshness, and scoring are protected.

taskRoutes.task: Backtest, portfolio, broker, accounting, auth, RBAC, or security work
taskRoutes.note: Read the exact owner source/tests and retain all fail-closed distinctions.

taskRoutes.task: Web UI, route, content, interaction, accessibility, or visual design work
taskRoutes.note: The design contract does not override runtime, auth, or domain truth.

taskRoutes.task: Dependency, lock, environment, bootstrap, local runtime, or configuration work
taskRoutes.note: Use ./wolfy; do not create a second install or resolver authority.

taskRoutes.task: Tests, topology, validation, browser UAT, or evidence qualification
taskRoutes.note: AGENTS.md owns evidence policy; this document routes commands.

taskRoutes.task: Database, storage, migration, restore, PostgreSQL, Phase F, or DuckDB work
taskRoutes.note: Migration and persistence changes require explicit scope.

taskRoutes.task: Operator evidence, production readiness, release, or target-environment work
taskRoutes.note: Sanitized evidence supports manual review and does not auto-approve release.

taskRoutes.task: Historical OHLCV foundation, cache seed, or readiness work
taskRoutes.note: A successful seed does not imply quote, scanner, or backtest readiness.

taskRoutes.task: Documentation architecture, AI instructions, generators, or navigation work
taskRoutes.note: Edit canonical sources and regenerate; do not edit generated outputs.

taskRoutes.task: Audit follow-up, remediation roadmap, or evidence retirement
taskRoutes.note: Read only the specifically applicable temporary report, never the whole audit corpus.
